Video.summary: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Bengaluru - Day 12 Tie 2

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Naples JBB United in a women's NPL match.
Video.title: Picklers vs JBB United (Women)

Image.alt: Picklers vs JBB United (Women)
Picklers vs JBB United (Women)
Picklers vs JBB United (Women)

Video.summary: This episode provides courtside commentary on Game 3 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, featuring the Fort Myers Flamingos and the Old Town Bangers. The commentators highlight the aggressive play of newcomer Jada Bui and the defensive prowess of Ellie Schele. They also discuss the importance of mental toughness and team chemistry in a high-pressure environment. The episode concludes with a preview of the upcoming men's match.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins in this Women's Senior Pro Quarterfinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.title: S01E05 - The Playoffs

Image.alt: S01E05 - The Playoffs
S01E05 - The Playoffs
S01E05 - The Playoffs

Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: Megan Fudge along with husband Ryler Deheart faced off against Simone Jardim & Kyle Yates in a Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1

Video.summary: Experience the "clash for the ages" as host city Mumbai Pickle Power takes on their fierce rivals, Delhi Dilwale, in a thrilling Day 2 encounter of the World Pickleball League Season 2. The day begins on a somber note with a tribute to the late Deputy Chief Minister of Maharashtra, Shri Ajit Pawar, as players compete with black armbands in front of a quieted stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: The stakes reach a boiling point at Mumbai's Jio World Garden as the league-leading Chennai Super Champs face off against the defending champions, the Bengaluru Jawans, in a critical top-of-the-table clash. Witness a masterclass in professional grit as "dominating" stars like Katrina Stewart and tactical veterans like Dusty Boyer battle for supremacy on the road to the semi-finals. From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. Experience the strategic drama of game-changing "Pickle Plays" and high-stakes challenges in a tie where one momentum shift could decide who walks away with the top spot in the league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: On January 31, 2023 - the Scottsdale Scorchers face off against the Tempe Tornadoes - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 31, 2023 - AZ PBL

Tuesday Night Pickleball - January 31, 2023 - AZ PBL

NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU
NCPA Round of 16: UW vs. FSU

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane

Video.summary: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy.
Video.title: Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy

Image.alt: Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy
Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy
Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
